betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Balefire§f is an extremely dangerous thermonuclear material.

§eTask Requirements:§f
• §bBalefire Egg Shard§f
• §bDefuser§f

§eProperties:§f
• Burns with nuclear intensity
• Creates persistent radiation
• Cannot be extinguished normally
• Self-sustaining reaction

§eUses:§f
• §bBalefire Bombs§f - Devastating explosives
• §bBF Rocket Fuel§f (Balefire + Antimatter) - Most powerful fuel

§c§4EXTREME DANGER:§f
Handle with maximum radiation protection!
Effects are catastrophic and long-lasting.

§aTip:§f Only use when you truly need ultimate destructive power.
